mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO application_materials_mapping (application_material_id, teaching_material_id, sequence, creator, add_datetime, operator, operation_datetime) VALUES
(#{item.applicationMaterialId}, #{item.teachingMaterialId}, #{item.sequence}, #{item.creator}, #{item.addDatetime}, #{item.operator}, #{item.operationDatetime})
mapper.select: SELECT amm.id, amm.application_material_id AS applicationMaterialId, amm.teaching_material_id AS teachingMaterialId, tm.name AS teachingMaterialName, tm.type, tm.file_path AS filePath, tm.cover_image_path AS coverImagePath, tm.file_size AS fileSize, amm.sequence FROM application_materials_mapping amm LEFT JOIN teaching_materials tm ON amm.teaching_material_id = tm.id WHERE amm.application_material_id = #{applicationMaterialId} ORDER BY amm.sequence ASC, amm.add_datetime ASC
